name: Ice Cream Sundae Dessert
recipeIngredient: 2 quarts vanilla ice cream or your choice of ice cream, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium heat, melt chocolate chips with milk and salt; cook and stir until thickened, about 25 minutes. Remove from the heat and set aside.
2. Combine wafer crumbs and butter; set aside.
3. Press remaining crumbs into a greased 13x9x2-inch pan. Chill for 10-15 minutes.
4. Pour chocolate over crumbs. Cover and freeze for 20-25 minutes, or until firm.
5. Spread ice cream over chocolate. Sprinkle with reserved crumbs.
6. Freeze at least 2 hours before serving.
